subtask: Summarize 10 Tableau dashboards into 6 stakeholder-ready insights for a Monthly Business Review using GPT

items.title: **Tableau Best Practices**: [Tableau Help](https://help.tableau.com/current/pro/desktop/en-us/dashboards_best_practices.htm)
items.why: "Upskill your abilities in prompt engineering and automation workflows with these resources. The Tableau Help link provides best practices for visualizing and interpreting data in Tableau, an essential tool for Monthly Business Review in healthcare claims. It will help you effectively present your AI-generated insights. The GPT-4 Applications link is a guide to prompt engineering, a crucial part of using AI to generate insights. It will help you learn how to structure effective prompts for AI, enabling you to automate the process of generating
